en.title: "The City Sounds Like It's Always Angry at Something." "Did It Yell at You to Get Off Its Lawn?"
"I Want to See Her Just As Much As I'd Rather Not" "...I Want To See Her!"
"Even a Human Can Fly... As Long As He Has the Guts." "Oh Yeah? Show Me Then."
"Isn't It Remarkable How the Sun Rises On Time Every Morning?" "That's Just Earth Rotating on it's Axis."
"What Are Killifish the Offspring Of?" "Other Killifish."
"I Want To Get Married In a Chapel Wearing a Wedding Gown." "What's a Chapel?"
"I Wonder What's For Dinner Tonight." "Mitsuko Said Croquettes."
"What Do You Do When You Feel Like Crying In the Middle of the of the Night?" "I Sing to Myself."
"What Do You Want To Be When You Grow Up?" "A Race Car Driver Bocing Chaption Spy."
"Why Do You Think Girls Cry So Easily?" "A Girl Can Get Away with Nearly Anything if She Just Cries."
"I Wonder Why Dracula's Fingernails Are So Long." "Duh, Because He Doesn't Cut Them."
"I Wonder Where Yokohama Is." "Beats Me... Somewhere near Tokyo?"
